programs.name: Crystal Disk Info
programs.description: HDD/SSD utility that displays the health status, temperature, and many other attributes of hard disk drives.

programs.name: CCleaner
programs.description: A utility to clean potentially unwanted files and invalid Windows Registry entries from a computer.

programs.name: Recuva
programs.description: Recuva is an application designed to recover files that have been accidentally deleted from your computer.
